modules.module_title: Hindi Keyboard Layouts (Remington vs Mangal) & Typing Basics
Speed Building, Touch Typing & Error Correction in Hindi
Fundamentals of Government Official Correspondence & noting
Drafting Official Letters, Memos, circulars & office Orders
Vocabulary, Technical Terms & Translation in Official Noting
Professional Ethics, confidentiality & Office file Management

questions.question: Hindi Typing & Official Noting-Drafting (Hindi manak aalekhan) ka primary goal kya hota hai?

options.A: Official Hindi keyboard layout typing, shashkiya patrachar notes aur standard drafting formats build karna
options.B: Only designing graphics web banners for advertising

questions.explanation: Government departments aur public sectors me rajbhasha compliance aur official notes/drafting details prepare karna is program ka primary aim hai.

questions.question: Modern computer operating systems me Hindi Typing ke liye standard Unicode font support layout kya kehlata hai?

options.A: Mangal Font layout (Inscript or Remington Gail keyboard options)

questions.explanation: Mangal font standard Unicode hindi font hai jo website data entry aur government online examinations me mandatory check kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Official correspondence rules me 'Tippani Lekhan' (Noting) ka kya objective hota hai?

options.A: File history details summarize karna, rules rules and regulations clear karna aur decision outcomes summarize karna
options.B: Writing long greetings cards for staff birthdays

questions.explanation: Tippani (Noting) senior officers ko cases and rules analyze karke decision making directions provide karti hai.

questions.question: Government letters design checks me 'Shashkiya Patra' (Official Letter) me top right side kya mention kiya jata hai?

options.A: Patra Sankhya aur Karyalaya ka naam (Letter number and office name)

questions.explanation: Official letter templates standard formatting rules ke according top middle/right areas me letter indices, dates aur sender organization details place hoti hain.

questions.question: Hindi typing speed tests criteria me 'Gross Speed' aur 'Net Speed' ka difference?

options.A: Net speed is gross speed minus typing error penalties
options.C: Net speed excludes punctuation symbols counts

questions.explanation: Net Speed actual speed hai jo correct words aur character typing details error trims ke baad deliver hoti hai.

questions.question: Noting-Drafting processes checks me, 'Circular' (Paripatra) kya signify karta hai?

options.A: A single letter sent to multiple offices/officers simultaneously to communicate instructions
options.B: Round shaped greeting badge of office
options.C: Confidential letter sent to single department

questions.explanation: Paripatra (circular) generic orders aur general directives ko broad network circles me dispatch karne ka efficient format hai.

questions.question: Hindi typing keyboard layouts me 'Remington Gail' layout characters positions kya mimic karte hain?

options.A: Traditional typewriters (purane typewriter keys layouts matches)
options.C: Standard US English QWERTY positions exactly

questions.explanation: Remington Gail keyboard positions purane mechanical typewriter design profiles par based hain, making transitions easy for senior typists.

questions.question: Official noting terminology me English word 'Approved' ka standard Hindi translation translation kya hota hai?

options.A: Anumodit (अनुमोदित)

questions.explanation: Approved ko hindi official files me 'Anumodit' ya 'Swikrit' write karke clear sanction status show kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Government file tracking systems me files classification checks me 'Urgent' (Tatkal) red tags ka kya rule hai?

options.A: File must be processed and moved to next desk within 24 hours of receipt
options.B: File is kept in storage lockers for 6 months
options.C: File is sent to local tax departments directly

questions.explanation: Urgent/Immediate priority tags signal fast files tracking, routing cases within strict target timings.

questions.question: Office confidentiality ethics checks me official files and draft letters security?

options.A: Never share draft notes or files data with unauthorized staff, media, or private citizens before official approval release
options.B: Post draft snippets on public social channels for citizen reviews
options.C: Sell data to competing agencies for commissions

questions.explanation: Office secrecy acts and confidentiality guidelines safeguard administrative decisions from early market speculations.

questions.question: Hindi typing speed tests metrics 'WPM' calculations target criteria?

options.A: Words Per Minute (5 characters are counted as 1 standard word in speed logs)

questions.explanation: Typing tests count every 5 keystrokes (including spaces) as one word to standardize WPM statistics.

questions.question: Official noting terminology 'Action taken' what is Hindi translation?

options.A: Karyavahi ki gayi (कार्यवाही की गई)

questions.explanation: Action taken is officially translated as 'Karyavahi ki gayi' in departmental notes.

questions.question: Hindi keyboard layout 'Inscript' why is it standard layout for Unicode typing?

options.A: Standardized by Government of India (designed logically based on phonetic sound rules)

questions.explanation: Inscript is logically mapped; vowels are grouped on the left and consonants on the right, speeding up touch typing.

questions.question: Official correspondence 'Office Memo' (Karyalaya Gyapan) when is it used?

options.A: To communicate internal instructions or alerts between departments or employees within the same office
options.B: To send official replies to external vendors

questions.explanation: Office Memos are internal correspondence tools, avoiding external greeting headers or signature wraps.

questions.question: Noting-Drafting logistics 'File indexing' why files have unique numeric codes?

options.A: Simplifies file tracking, archiving, and retrieval runs from archives

questions.explanation: Unique file codes group subjects logically, avoiding search delays during urgent administrative audits.

options.A: Karyavahi ki gayi (कार्यवाही की گئی)

questions.explanation: Action taken is officially translated as 'Karyavahi ki gayi' in departmental notes.

questions.question: Hindi typing speed building 'Home Row' resting finger positions key guides?

options.A: Resting index fingers on standard guiding keys (typically F and J on QWERTY, matching home row setups)
options.B: Resting palms on numeric keys always
options.C: Keeping fingers hovering high above keyboard

questions.explanation: Touch typing rests fingers on the home row, allowing muscle memory to locate keys without looking down.

questions.question: Official Noting terminology 'Draft for approval' what is Hindi translation?

options.A: Praroop anumodanarth (प्रारूप अनुमोदनार्थ)

questions.explanation: Draft is translated as 'Praroop', and for approval is 'Anumodanarth' in formal government files.

questions.question: Hindi translation 'Please discuss' in official notes translation?

options.A: Kripya charcha karein (कृपया चर्चा करें)

questions.explanation: 'Please discuss' is a common short note written by senior officers, translated as 'Kripya charcha karein'.

questions.question: Official correspondence 'Notification' (Adhisuchna) where is it published?

options.A: Official Gazette of Government (Rajpatra - राजपत्र)

questions.explanation: Adhisuchna (Notification) holds legal weight, demanding publication in the official government Rajpatra.

questions.question: Official notes 'Tippan' writing style what is correct note composition?

options.A: Written in passive voice, third person, using polite formal terminology (avoiding emotional statements)
options.B: Written in active first person using direct command words

questions.explanation: Official notes are objective records, demanding neutral third-person tones to ensure administrative impartiality.

questions.question: Home row finger resting F J?

questions.question: Hindi typing shortcuts 'Halant usage' how is half consonant formed in Unicode Mangal?

options.A: Type full letter, then press Halant key (्), then type next letter
options.B: Press Shift key together with the consonant key
options.C: Halant is not used in Unicode typing

questions.explanation: In Unicode typing, the Halant diacritic (्) joins characters, automatically rendering the first letter as a half consonant.

questions.question: Official notes terminology 'Urgent action' what is translation?

options.A: Tatkal karyavahi (तत्काल कार्रवाई)

questions.explanation: Urgent Action is translated as 'Tatkal karyavahi' in official noting processes.

questions.question: Hindi translation 'Submit report' in noting context?

options.A: Aahval prastut karein (प्रतिवेदन प्रस्तुत करें)

questions.explanation: Report is પ્રતિવેદન (Prativendan) or Aahval, and submit is 'Prastut karein'.

questions.question: Official correspondence 'Office Order' (Karyalaya Aadesh) when is it issued?

options.A: To communicate personnel changes (eg promotions, transfers, leave sanctions) within the office
options.B: To invite public tenders from builders

questions.explanation: Karyalaya Aadesh has internal administrative authority, locking personnel rules and staff duties.

questions.question: Office filing safety 'File movement register' why is every file transit logged?

options.A: Maintains a track of which desk/officer holds the file currently, preventing loss of files
options.C: Used by tax inspectors to check sales volumes

questions.explanation: A file tracking log maps file transits, making it easy to locate files for urgent audits.

questions.question: Hindi typing practice 'Speed building' how often is touch typing practice recommended?

options.A: Daily 30-60 minutes (using online typing tutors, focusing on accuracy first)
options.B: Once a month for 10 hours continuously
options.C: Practice is not required for speed
options.D: Accuracy is ignored in typing tests

questions.explanation: Consistent daily practice builds muscle memory, helping learners achieve high WPM speeds.

questions.question: Official notes terminology 'Self-contained note' what does it mean?

options.A: A note that includes all relevant rules, details, and background facts so senior officers don't have to read reference books
options.B: A note written in secret shorthand codes
options.C: A note that contains only the signature of the writer

questions.explanation: Self-contained notes summarize key details, allowing officers to make decisions quickly without scanning separate files.

questions.question: Hindi translation 'Action may be taken as proposed' in noting context?

options.A: Yatha prastavit karyavahi ki jaye (यथा प्रस्तावित कार्रवाई की जाए)

questions.explanation: 'Yatha prastavit' means as proposed, and 'karyavahi ki jaye' is action may be taken.

questions.question: Official correspondence 'Demiofficial Letter' (Ardha-Shashkiya Patra) when is it written?

options.A: To draw personal attention of an officer in another department to expedite a delayed file
options.D: DO letters hold zero official weight

questions.explanation: Demiofficial (DO) letters use personal salutations (eg 'Dear Shri...') to draw direct attention to pending files.

questions.question: Office operations 'Confidential file disposal' how are old secret drafts destroyed?

options.A: By shredding or burning (preventing data leaks in garbage dumps)
options.B: Throwing drafts intact in public dustbins
options.C: Selling papers to local recycling shops

questions.explanation: Secret files must be shredded or burned to protect administrative data integrity.

questions.question: Hindi typing layouts 'Alt Codes' why are they used in Remington layout?

options.A: To type special characters and half-consonants (eg 'क्र', 'द्व', 'fraction symbols' using Alt key combinations)
options.B: Alt codes are used to close the typing software
options.C: Alt keys speed up normal alphabet typing

questions.explanation: Legacy Remington layouts lack keys for some complex conjuncts, requiring Alt + numeric code entries.

questions.question: Official noting terminology 'For decision' what is translation?

options.A: Nirnayarth (निर्णयार्थ)

questions.explanation: For decision is officially translated as 'Nirnayarth' in departmental noting files.

questions.question: Hindi translation 'Please verify the records' in official notes?

options.A: Kripya abhilekho ki janch karein (कृपया अभिलेखों की जांच करें)

questions.explanation: Records translate as 'Abhilekh', and verify is 'Janch karein' in official correspondence.

questions.question: Official correspondence 'Endorsement' (Prashankan) what is its function?

options.A: Attaching a copy of a letter to send to other departments for information or action
options.B: Signing the end of a private letter
options.C: Registering letters in the post office

questions.explanation: Prashankan (Endorsement) forwards letter copies to other officers, outlining what action they need to take.

questions.question: Office operations 'File tracking number' how are files numbered in central registries?

options.A: Year-Department-File Category-Serial Number (eg 2026-Admin-Noting-045)

questions.explanation: Standardized file numbers group records by year and department, making tracking and retrieval efficient.

questions.question: Hindi typing practice 'Warm-up exercises' what keys are practiced first before speed runs?

options.A: Home Row drills (typing 'asdfg' and 'hjkl;' equivalents repeatedly)

questions.explanation: Home row drills warm up finger joints, helping typists build rhythm and reduce errors.

questions.question: Official noting terminology 'Pending' what is translation?

options.A: Lambi (लंबित)

questions.explanation: Pending is translated as 'Lambi' in official files, indicating the case is still under review.

questions.question: Hindi translation 'Submit file today' in noting context?

options.A: Kripya aaj hi nastee pesh karein (कृपया आज ही नस्ती पेश करें)

questions.explanation: File is translated as 'Nastee' in formal settings, and submit is 'Pesh karein'.

questions.question: Official correspondence 'Sanction Order' (Swikriti Aadesh) what does it authorize?

options.A: Expenditure of funds or allocation of resources for a project
options.D: Swikriti order has no budget authority

questions.explanation: Swikriti Aadesh authorizes spending, serving as the legal permission for financial transactions.

questions.question: Office filing systems 'Weeding of files' what does it mean?

options.A: Reviewing old files and destroying those whose retention period has expired
options.B: Watering indoor office plant tubs daily
options.C: Changing file covers color codes annually
options.D: Weeding is banned in government offices

questions.explanation: Weeding clears space in central registries by removing expired records, keeping database systems clean.

questions.question: Hindi typing Remington layout 'Shift key rules' what happens when Shift is held with consonants?

options.A: Types the half consonant equivalent (eg Shift + 'k' types half 'ka')
options.B: Changes font family to English script
options.D: Shift has no role in Remington layout

questions.explanation: Holding Shift with consonant keys is the standard way to type half-letters in Remington Gail keyboard layout.

options.A: Kripya smaran patra bhejein (कृपया स्मरण पत्र भेजें)

questions.question: Official correspondence 'Memo' (Gyapan) what is key distinction from Shashkiya Patra?

options.A: Does not contain formal salutations (eg 'Dear Sir') or formal subscription (eg 'Yours faithfully')

questions.explanation: Memo is internal, using direct objective headers like 'Gyapan' and skipping formal salutation blocks.

questions.question: Office file management 'Classified files storage' how are secret files locked?

options.A: Stored in steel cabinets with double locking bar systems, accessible only to authorized section officers
options.B: Stored loosely on open desk tables near entrance gates
options.C: Stored in digital cloud folders accessible to public link

questions.explanation: Classified files are kept in secure steel cabinets to prevent unauthorized access and protect confidentiality.

questions.explanation: Government departments aur public sectors me rajbhasha compliance aur official notes/drafting details prepare karna is program ka primary aim hai.

questions.question: Unicode font Mangal layout standard?

options.A: Mangal Font layout (Inscript or Remington Gail keyboard options)

questions.explanation: Mangal font standard Unicode hindi font hai jo website data entry aur government online examinations me mandatory check kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Noting Tippani Lekhan history rules?

options.A: File history details summarize karna, rules rules and regulations clear karna aur decision outcomes summarize karna
options.B: Writing long greetings cards for staff birthdays

questions.explanation: Tippani (Noting) senior officers ko cases and rules analyze karke decision making directions provide karti hai.

questions.question: Shashkiya Patra letter number office?

options.A: Patra Sankhya aur Karyalaya ka naam (Letter number and office name)

questions.explanation: Official letter templates standard formatting rules ke according top middle/right areas me letter indices, dates aur sender organization details place hoti hain.

questions.question: Hindi gross speed net speed differences?

options.A: Net speed is gross speed minus typing error penalties
options.C: Net speed excludes punctuation symbols counts

questions.explanation: Net Speed actual speed hai jo correct words aur character typing details error trims ke baad deliver hoti hai.

questions.question: Paripatra circular multiple offices directive?

options.A: A single letter sent to multiple offices/officers simultaneously to communicate instructions
options.B: Round shaped greeting badge of office
options.C: Confidential letter sent to single department

questions.explanation: Paripatra (circular) generic orders aur general directives ko broad network circles me dispatch karne ka efficient format hai.

questions.question: Hindi typing Remington typewriters keys?

options.A: Traditional typewriters (purane typewriter keys layouts matches)
options.C: Standard US English QWERTY positions exactly

questions.explanation: Remington Gail keyboard positions purane mechanical typewriter design profiles par based hain, making transitions easy for senior typists.

questions.question: Approved noting swikrit Anumodit?

options.A: Anumodit (अनुमोदित)

questions.explanation: Approved ko hindi official files me 'Anumodit' ya 'Swikrit' write karke clear sanction status show kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Urgent file processing 24 hours?

options.A: File must be processed and moved to next desk within 24 hours of receipt
options.B: File is kept in storage lockers for 6 months
options.C: File is sent to local tax departments directly

questions.explanation: Urgent/Immediate priority tags signal fast files tracking, routing cases within strict target timings.
